description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Integration tests that runs on workflow dispatch with an optional commit or tag input and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: run-tests on a Docker environment that checks out the specified commit or tag, builds a Docker image, and runs integration tests and ctest tests; and rust-clippy on an ubuntu-22.04 environment that checks out the code, configures the cache, installs the Rust toolchain, and runs Cargo clippy.
